name: @elumixor/zod-config-cli
description: Read config from file, env, and CLI args — validated with Zod

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --sourcemap=external && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "Release v%s" && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "Release v%s" && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "Release v%s" && git push --tags
